name_en: Museum of Fine Arts of Asturias
name_local: Museo de Bellas Artes de Asturias

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the audio guide desk is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está el mostrador de audioguías?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh eh-STAH ehl mohs-trah-DOHR deh ow-dyoh-GWEE-ahs?

likely_response.local: En la planta baja, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH PLAHN-tah BAH-hah AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: On the ground floor, to the left.

responses.english: On the ground floor, to the left.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH PLAHN-tah BAH-hah AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.local: En la planta baja, a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the current temporary exhibition is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde se encuentra la exposición temporal?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DON-deh se en-KWEN-trah la eks-po-see-SYOHN tem-po-RAHL?

likely_response.local: Sala principal, segundo piso, siga las señales.
likely_response.pronunciation: SAH-lah preen-thee-PAHL seh-GOON-doh PEE-soh SEE-gah LAHS seh-NYAH-lehs
likely_response.translation_en: Main hall, second floor, follow the signs.

responses.english: Main hall, second floor, follow the signs.
responses.phonetic: SAH-lah preen-thee-PAHL seh-GOON-doh PEE-soh SEE-gah LAHS seh-NYAH-lehs
responses.local: Sala principal, segundo piso, siga las señales.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if free entry requires registration
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿la entrada gratis necesita registro previo?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, lah ehn-TRAH-dah grah-TEES neh-seh-SEE-tah reh-HEES-troh preh-vee-OH?

likely_response.local: Solo los domingos, sin registro en taquilla.
likely_response.pronunciation: SOH-loh LOHS doh-MEEN-gohs SEEN reh-HEE-stroh EHN tah-k-EEL-lah
likely_response.translation_en: Check the official website for the exact procedure.

responses.english: Check the official website for the exact procedure.
responses.phonetic: SOH-loh LOHS doh-MEEN-gohs SEEN reh-HEE-stroh EHN tah-k-EEL-lah
responses.local: Solo los domingos, sin registro en taquilla.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Spanish art collection is
phrases.text_local: ¿Dónde puedo encontrar la colección de arte español?
phrases.pronunciation: DOHN-deh PWEH-doh en-kon-TRAHR lah koh-lehk-SYOHN deh AR-teh es-pah-NYOL?

likely_response.local: Piso segundo, salas centrales del museo.
likely_response.pronunciation: PEE-soh seh-GOON-doh SAH-lahs thehnt-RAH-lehs DEHL moo-SEH-oh
likely_response.translation_en: Second floor, central halls of the museum.

responses.english: Second floor, central halls of the museum.
responses.phonetic: PEE-soh seh-GOON-doh SAH-lahs thehnt-RAH-lehs DEHL moo-SEH-oh
responses.local: Piso segundo, salas centrales del museo.
